sources.text:
HP laptops, soon to be #MadeInTamilNadu ! 

Another big day for #electronics manufacturing in #TamilNadu! 

Today in the presence of Honourable @CMOTamilNadu Thiru. @MKStalin avargal, Dixon Technologies has signed an MoU for a brand-new, state-of-the-art manufacturing facility at Oragadam near Chenn

Fasten your Fastners it's MoU time🔩!!!

Another global manufacturing leader chooses #TamilNadu 🌟

Bulten Group, through its Indian arm PSM Fasteners India, has signed an MoU with the Government of Tamil Nadu to establish a new fastners manufacturing facility in Oragadam. 

This project will see an i

🚨Another Investment!!
🇸🇪Swedish Engineering Major Bulten Group through its Indian subsidiary PSM Fasteners India signs MoU to establish a new fasteners manufacturing facility in Oragadam at an investment of 525 Crs & creating 2000 jobs.... #InvestInTN #OneTrillion

#SIPCOT பிள்ளைப்பாக்கத்தில் உற்பத்தியைத் தொடங்கிய கார்னிங் கூட்டுநிறுவனமான BIG Tech: எவராலும் தடுக்க முடியாத தமிழ்நாட்டின் வளர்ச்சி!

Inaugurated BIG Tech, at #SIPCOT Pillaipakkam, the joint venture of #Corning International Corporation and #Optiemus Infracom that brings India’s first advanced front

Inaugurated Agile Robots SE’s AI-driven robotics plant at Irungattukottai SIPCOT and SOL’s air separation facility at Ranipet SIPCOT today, attracting Rs. 475 crore investment and creating jobs for our youth. 

Tamil Nadu is the only state where manufacturing contributes 25% to GSDP. The #DravidianM
